# add(_:)

**Instance Method**

Adds an existing asset to the receiver.

## Declaration

```swift
func add(_ asset: ALAsset!) -> Bool
```

## Parameters

- **asset**: The asset to add to the receiver.

## Return Value

[doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] if `asset` was added successfully, otherwise [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false].

## Discussion

The method may fail (return [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false]) if the group is not editable, or if the asset could not be added to the group.

You should check the [doc://com.apple.assetslibrary/documentation/AssetsLibrary/ALAssetsGroup/isEditable] property of the group to see if it is possible to add an asset to the group.

## Adding Assets

- **isEditable**: Indicates whether the application can edit the group.
